content:
Definition of Aqidah - تعريف العقيدة Linguistic - لغوي مأخوذة من العقد
وهو الربط - وصل شيءٍ بشيءٍ
على سبيل الوثوق والإستحكام
و من شر النفثت في العقد
To connect something to another thing
very strongly and tight to make a knot Technical - إصطلاحي علم
يقتدر به على إثبات الحقائق الدينية
من أدلّتها اليقينية
و رفع الشبهة عنها
science
enables us to prove the realities/truths of the religion
from the evidences (which are clear-cut - i.e. logic, نصّ)
and removing any doubt on it
Other names - أسماء الأخرى للعقيدة الفقه الأكبر - as named by أبو حنيفة شرح الفقه الأكبر لملا علي القارئ علم الكلام علم أصول الدين علم التوحيد والصفات Ruling on learning Aqidah - حكم تعلّم العقيدة عقعدة إجمالية - to know the whole picture (e.g. الاركان الإيمان) فرض عيني عقيدة تفصيلية - to go into details with proofs etc فرض كفائي
summary: Defining Aqidah, Other names for it, and the ruling of learning it
title: 3. Tahawiyyah - Introduction to the science of Aqidah

content:
On the levels of a legist - طبقات المجتهد ١. المجتهد المطلق
can derive rulings straight from Quran and sunnah e.g. الإمام الأعظم ٢. المجتهد المنتسب
will agree with the principles that were laid out by the Imam, implementation of usul might be different results in different ruling from the Imam e.g. إمام أبو يوسف/ الشيباني ٣. المجتهد المسألة
will not do ijtihaad on ruled upon issues e.g. إمام الطحاوي ٤. المجتهد الترجيح
will choose one existing opinion over another This was mentioned as a side point due to praise of ابن عابدين for الطحاوي.
فهو من اهل الإجتهاد في المسائل التي لا رواية فيها من صاحب المذهب
summary: Discussion on the levels of a legist - طباقات المجتهد
title: 2. Tahawiyyah - Praise of Imam Tahawi

content:
On the author أبو جعفر أحمد بن محمد بن سلامة الطحاوي الحنفي
من طحا - بصعيد مصر - southern part of The Nile
الأزدي
٢٣٩ - ٣٢١ ه
عالماً في الحديث والأخبار
nephew of إبراهيم المُزَنِي الشافعي:
equivalent of أبو يوسف for the Shafi’is Shafi’i -> Hanafi
he saw المزني take from Hanafi views for novel questions Books written:
معاني الآثار مشكل الآثار عقيدة أهل السنة - عقيدة الطحاوية مختصر الطحاوي On أهل السنة Hadith of 73 sects All except one (أهل السنة والجماعة) in the fire examples of different sects: Khawarij - الخوارج believe doing a major sins is a disbeliever Mu’tazila - المعتزلة believe doing a major sins is in between Imaan and Kufr - في منزلة بين المنزلتين Shi’a - الشيعة المرجئة
summary: Basic introduction to author and discussion on different sects

title: 2023 Reading List

content:
﷽
In early 2023, with the grace and mercy of Allah, I decided to enrol onto an Alimiyah cohort that was half way through the second year.
What you may or may not see:
notes 1 the physical (or digital) manifestations of people’s duas for me musings poetry (in all multiple languages) Most students do not keep a diary - certainly not a public one, but I figure this would be a nice time capsule for me, my teachers, and my peers to look back at and be grateful for. To see myself hopefully being lifted away from the darkness and into the light.
I was inspired to do this by a Twitter account called DarsDiary, but I think Twitter is too noisy for this kind of content. Ergo, ayn.
All feedback is much appreciated.
Why ع ? The name of first dictionary in Arabic (written by the al-Khalil) To know - علم - يعلم - a word that begins with ع How ع ? I built ayn using hugo, deployed on netlify. Everything you see will be written in pandoc, to allow for easy conversion into LaTeX/PDFs.
اللهم صل علي حبينا محمد الفاتح لما أغلق، والخاتم لما سبق، ناصر الحق بالحق، والهادي إلى صراطك المستقم، وعلى آله حق قدره مقداره العظيم
I collate the things I learn from multiple places. Where appropriate, I will state my sources. Views are my own, and not representative of the institutions that I name/study in. ↩︎
title: About

content:
This issue arises in Fatiha, in الرحمن الرحيم - ملك يوم الدين , but Shatibi doesn’t expand on it in that chapter - there’s too much to mention (unlike Silah of meem jam` - which he does expand on)
116 - وَدُونَكَ الاُِدْغَامَ الْكَبِيرَ وَقُطْبُهُ … أَبُو عَمْرٍو الْبَصْرِيُّ فِيهِ تَحَفَّلَا
And take Idgham Kabir’s Qutb (leader), Abu `Amr al-Basri in (who’s rewayah) it has been compiled
وَقُطْبُهُ literally means pole or axis - so the leader that everything revolves around
فِيهِ تَحَفَّلَا in Abu `Amr’s rewayah it has been compiled or this chapter concerns him - أي في هذا الباب احتفى و اهتمّ
أَبُو عَمْرٍو الْبَصْرِيُّ In reality it’s just Susi rather than Doori (in Shatibiyyah who does Idgham Kabir)
Definition of Idgham لغةً : when one thing enters another إصطلاحاً: The pronouncing of two letters as one letter with a shaddah instead of there being two elevations (or movements) of the tongue, there will be one -Imam Sakhāwi
It is not the entering or mixing (إدخال الحرف إلى الحرف آخر) of one letter into another 1
Classifying different types of Idgham Kabir: both are with Harakat Saghir: first is ساكن and second is متحرك called صغير as there is less to do to achieve the إدغام و بالعكس للإدغام الكبير Reasons for (and further classification of the two types of) إدغام:
2 letters of the same letter - متماثلين
2 letters of similar exit points but varying in traits - متقاربين
2 letters of similar traits but different exit points - متجانسين
saghir (with its 3 sub types) is present with all qurra'
As for متباعدين - two letters which are distant in مخرج , there is no إدغام for them e.g. نْ + حروف الحلق
Idgham Kabir in one word 117 - فَفِي كِلْمَةٍ عَنْهُ مَنَاسِككُّمْ وَمَا … سَلَككُّمْ وَبَاقِي الْبَابِ لَيْسَ مُعَوَّلَا
And in one word مناسككم and ما سلككم the rest of the chapter does not rely on it
مَنَاسِككُّمْ Some read the poem with silah 2, (to not break the meter or the flow?) but no-one actually does silah with Idgham kabir, so it might be better to keep meem jam` as sakin
these two are the only 2 words with إدغام كبير المثلين في كلمة واحدة
even though there are others which would qualify (like فإنك بأعيننا، فتكوى بها جباههم etc..) Idgham Kabir between two words 118 - وَمَا كَانَ مِنْ مِثْلَيْنِ فِي كِلْمَتَيْهِمَا … فَلاَ بُدَّ مِنْ إدْغَامِ مَا كانَ أَوَّلَا
As for مثلين in two two words there is no doubt there is إدغام like the first
119 - كَيَعْلَمُ مَا فِيهِ هُدًى وَطُبِعْ عَلَى … قُلُوبِهِمُ وَالْعَفْوَ وَأْمُرْ تَمَثَّلَا
Like in يَعْلَمُ مَا, فِيهِ هُدًى, طُبِعْ عَلَى قُلُوبِهِمُ
That would be Ishmaam. ↩︎
Along with the idghaam kabir too. ↩︎
summary: An expl. of إدغام كبير - lines 116 - 119 of shatibiyah
title: Idghaam Kabir - إدغام كبير
